label: The Ration Lockup
description: The Ration Lockup forms a narrow, low-ceilinged chamber cut into the canteen’s vitrified basalt shell and faced with scavenged wreck-metal to match the drinking hall’s patchwork plating. Slagcrete shelving and bolted transit cages line the walls in regimented tiers, their surfaces stained with ash-fall residue and condenser runoff. A mesh-baffled lumen strip casts the same bruise-hued gloom as the canteen beyond, while insulated seals and vox-suppression cladding preserve the bastion’s characteristic muted thrum. The air remains cold and dry under continuous venting, maintaining stores against the basin’s grit and electrostatic storms.
